title: Anatomy of a Blockchain Account
description: A visual breakdown of the key components that make up an account on a blockchain, such as Ethereum, showing how they interrelate.
relationships: The Account Address is a cryptographically derived identifier
The Balance is the amount of native cryptocurrency held
The Nonce increments with each transaction to prevent replay attacks
If present, Contract Code defines a smart contract account
The Storage Root is a Merkle Patricia Trie root hash of the account's internal state
